description: Style NoteUnderstated colouring on the base with shiny stones makes these sandals classy and elegant. They can be worn with ethnic Indian wear and also with a pair of jeans and a nice kurta with some ethnic accessories.Heel: 2.5''Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with thong style straps that have crystal embellishmentsSilver heel with heel capSilver footbed with a TPR outsole Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
